prompt: Summarise the following sentence in 5 words or fewer: 'The quarterly earnings report showed that the company's net profit increased by 22% compared to the same period last year, driven primarily by strong performance in its cloud services division.'

Summarise the following meeting note in one sentence: 'The team discussed the upcoming product launch scheduled for next Friday. John will handle the press release, Sarah will update the website, and Mike will coordinate with the sales team. Everyone agreed to meet again on Wednesday for a final check.'

Write a TL;DR (one to two sentences) for the following: 'Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a technique that improves the accuracy of AI-generated responses by allowing the model to search an external knowledge base before generating a response. Instead of relying solely on patterns learned during training, the model retrieves relevant documents and uses them as context.'

Summarise this email in three bullet points: 'Hi team, just a reminder that the office will be closed on Friday for the public holiday. Please ensure that all pending tasks are completed by Thursday end of day. If you need to access the building on Friday, please contact facilities at least 24 hours in advance. Have a great long weekend!'

Condense the following into one short paragraph: 'Water is essential for all known life forms. It regulates body temperature, transports nutrients, and removes waste products from cells. The human body is approximately 60% water by weight. Dehydration, even mild, can impair cognitive function and physical performance.'

Summarise the following instruction in a single sentence: 'To create a new project in the app, click the New Project button in the top right corner of the dashboard. Enter the project name and select a template from the dropdown list. Add collaborators by typing their email addresses. Click Save to create the project.'

Write a one-sentence executive summary of the following: 'The team spent Q3 reducing manual review time by 35% through automation, improving error detection rates by introducing a new QA pipeline, and publishing weekly metrics reports to increase transparency with stakeholders.'

Summarise the following research abstract in 3 to 4 sentences for a non-technical audience: 'We propose a self-supervised contrastive learning method for learning visual representations from unlabelled video data. Our approach leverages temporal consistency across video frames as a supervisory signal, outperforming existing methods on downstream classification tasks by 4.7% on Kinetics-400. The model requires no human annotations during pre-training and scales effectively with dataset size.'

Summarise the following product requirements document section into a concise list of three acceptance criteria: 'The user authentication system must allow users to register with an email address and a password of at least 8 characters, including one number and one special character. Upon registration, users must receive a verification email. The system must lock accounts after 5 consecutive failed login attempts and send an unlock link to the registered email.'

Summarise the following article excerpt in 2 to 3 sentences, preserving all key facts: 'Global electric vehicle sales reached 14 million units in 2023, representing 18% of all new car sales worldwide. China accounted for 60% of global EV sales, followed by Europe at 25% and the United States at 10%. Battery prices fell to an average of $139 per kWh, a 14% decline from the previous year, driven by improved manufacturing efficiency and raw material supply increases.'

Read the following performance review excerpt and produce a concise 2-sentence summary highlighting strengths and development areas: 'Alex has consistently delivered projects on time and demonstrates strong technical knowledge, particularly in backend development. However, communication with cross-functional teams remains an area for growth, as stakeholders have noted delays in receiving status updates. Alex has shown willingness to improve and has started attending bi-weekly sync meetings.'

Summarise the following incident report into a brief root cause statement and two corrective actions: 'On the evening of March 14th, the payment processing service experienced 47 minutes of downtime. Logs indicate that a database connection pool was exhausted after an unexpected traffic spike caused by a marketing campaign. The engineering team manually restarted the connection pool to restore service. A post-incident review was held the following day.'

Summarise the following book synopsis in 2 sentences: 'The book explores how small habits, compounded over time, produce remarkable results. The author argues that a 1% improvement each day leads to a 37-fold improvement over a year. He introduces frameworks for habit formation, breaking habits into cue, craving, response, and reward, and explains how to design environments that make good habits easier and bad habits harder.'

Summarise the following HR policy update into three clear points that employees need to know: 'Effective from the first of next month, all employees working remotely must log their work hours using the new time-tracking system. Remote workers are expected to be available on Slack during core hours of 10am to 3pm in their local time zone. Employees who require exceptions to these hours due to childcare or medical needs must submit a request to HR at least two weeks in advance.'

Summarise the following dense technical paper section into a clear 4-sentence explanation suitable for a software engineering blog post, preserving technical accuracy: 'We introduce a novel attention mechanism, Sparse Factored Attention (SFA), that reduces the quadratic computational complexity of standard self-attention to O(n log n) by decomposing the attention matrix into a product of sparse lower-rank factors. SFA maintains 97.3% of the model quality on GLUE benchmarks while reducing peak GPU memory consumption by 42% on sequences of length 4096. The factorisation is learned end-to-end during training without requiring hand-crafted sparsity patterns.'

You are given the minutes from a 90-minute board meeting covering five agenda items: Q2 financial results, a proposed acquisition, a regulatory compliance update, a headcount review, and ESG reporting. The minutes are 1,200 words. Produce a structured executive summary of no more than 150 words covering the key decision reached, one open question, and one action item from each agenda item.

Summarise and synthesise the following three conflicting expert opinions on remote work productivity into a balanced 3-sentence paragraph that acknowledges the strongest point of each view: View 1 — Remote workers are 13% more productive due to fewer interruptions. View 2 — Collaboration and innovation suffer significantly without in-person contact. View 3 — Productivity outcomes depend almost entirely on the nature of the work and the individual, rendering broad generalisations meaningless.

Summarise the following 5-paragraph technical design document into a structured one-page overview with sections for Problem Statement, Proposed Solution, Technical Trade-offs, and Open Questions: 'The current monolithic architecture handles 10,000 requests per second at peak and is approaching its scaling ceiling. Horizontal scaling is blocked by a shared database connection pool and a single-threaded event loop. The proposal is to extract the authentication service into a standalone microservice with its own data store, allowing independent scaling. However, this introduces latency for cross-service calls and requires a distributed session management strategy. Key open questions include token expiry policy and cross-service authorisation enforcement.'

Read the following earnings call transcript excerpt and produce a 100-word investor-ready summary highlighting revenue performance, key growth drivers, risks mentioned, and forward guidance: 'Revenue grew 18% year-over-year to $1.2 billion, driven by a 31% increase in cloud segment revenue, which now accounts for 44% of total revenue. The CFO noted that while gross margins expanded 1.8 points to 72.4%, operating expenses rose 22% due to aggressive hiring. The CEO highlighted AI integration across product lines as the primary growth driver for the next two years but flagged macroeconomic uncertainty and potential enterprise spending slowdowns as key risks. Full-year revenue guidance was raised to $4.8 to $5.0 billion.'

Summarise the following multi-source information into a single coherent 150-word briefing document: Source A: A new European regulation requires all companies processing personal data of EU citizens to appoint a Data Protection Officer by January next year. Source B: Our legal team estimates the compliance cost at $120,000 in the first year, including hiring and tooling. Source C: Our engineering team has flagged that 3 of our 7 data pipelines do not yet meet the new anonymisation requirements. Source D: A competitor was fined €2.4 million last quarter for non-compliance with a similar regulation.

Summarize this email exchange between a client and a customer service representative, identifying the main complaint and the agreed resolution: 'Client: My order arrived damaged. Rep: Sorry, we will send a replacement free of charge. Client: Perfect, thanks.'
Write a short summary (3-4 sentences) of this brief news article about a new public transit line opening in a city next month.
Condense this meeting transcript into a bulleted list of action items: 'Alice will update slides. Bob will send budget. Charlie to confirm the calendar by Friday.'
Provide a quick overview (TL;DR) of this instruction manual for setting up a smart home thermostat in under 50 words.
Summarize this product description, highlighting the key features and target audience of a new fitness tracker.
Write a brief synopsis of this paragraph discussing the life cycle of a butterfly, explaining the four stages: egg, larva, pupa, and adult.
Summarize this memo regarding the new office security protocol, listing the three steps employees must take when entering after hours.
Condense this customer feedback report into a single paragraph outlining the main areas of satisfaction and dissatisfaction with a new vacuum cleaner.
Summarize this text describing the rules of soccer, focusing on team size, game duration, and the primary objective.
Provide a summary of this recipe, listing the main preparation steps and cooking times for making a lasagna.
Write a short summary (2-3 sentences) of this historical paragraph about the construction of the Great Wall of China.
Summarize this short paragraph describing the water cycle, focusing on evaporation, condensation, and precipitation.
Condense this employee onboarding email into a checklist of the first-day requirements, such as ID collection, IT setup, and HR signoffs.
Summarize this announcement from a school principal regarding the rescheduled sports day events, listing new dates and times.
Provide a brief overview of this article discussing the benefits of drinking water daily, highlighting the effects on energy levels and skin health.
Summarize this short paragraph explaining how a solar panel converts sunlight into electricity using photovoltaic cells.
Condense this user review of a hotel into a list of pros and cons, focusing on location, room size, and customer service quality.
Summarize this text outlining the safety rules for a swimming pool, highlighting diving restrictions and adult supervision requirements.
Write a short summary of this article about the discovery of a new dinosaur fossil in Argentina, detailing its estimated size and age.
Summarize this short text explaining the concept of recycling and its importance in reducing waste in landfill sites.

Summarize this 10-page clinical trial research paper abstract, explaining the methodology, sample size, primary endpoints, statistical significance, and clinical implications: 'The trial evaluated a new drug for hypertension on 500 patients over 12 weeks. Systolic pressure decreased significantly (p < 0.01) compared to the placebo group.'

Summarize this corporate software security policy regarding remote access, highlighting the requirements for VPN usage, multi-factor authentication (MFA), password complexity rules, session timeouts, and the protocol for reporting a security incident.

Summarize this commercial real estate lease agreement, extracting the lease term, monthly rent calculation, maintenance responsibilities, security deposit details, subleasing restrictions, and termination clauses.

Summarize this academic literature review on the impact of social media on teenage mental health. Outline the main theories discussed, the conflicting findings, and the suggested areas for future research.

Summarize this detailed project status report for a software development team. Identify the completed milestones, active blockages, budget allocation status, and revised target launch dates for the next two quarters.

Provide a structured summary of this regulatory compliance document regarding GDPR guidelines for customer data storage, outlining the definitions of data controller, consent requirements, data retention policies, and fines for non-compliance.

Summarize this quarterly earnings call transcript for a public tech firm. Identify the main drivers of revenue growth, the areas of rising operational expenses, and the management's guidance for the upcoming fiscal year.

Summarize this document detailing the history of industrial regulations in the United States, tracing the development of labor standards, environmental protection laws, and antitrust policies over the last century.

Summarize this system architecture design description for a scalable web application. Outline the data flow from client requests through load balancers, web servers, redis cache, and read-replica databases.

Summarize this legal non-disclosure agreement (NDA), extracting the definition of confidential information, the exceptions to confidentiality, the duration of the agreement, and the remedies for breach of contract.
Summarize this detailed onboarding guide for a healthcare clinic, outlining patient registration, insurance verification, appointment scheduling, billing workflows, and EHR software usage rules.
Summarize this research paper on the effectiveness of carbon taxes, detailing the impact on emissions, economic growth, consumer energy costs, and business competitiveness across developed nations.

Summarize this incident report regarding a database outage, detailing the root cause (disk space exhaustion), the timeline of recovery actions, the data loss assessment (zero data lost), and the preventative measures scheduled.
Summarize this travel guide for Tokyo, extracting the top tourist attractions, recommended transportation options, tipping etiquette, and cultural guidelines for visiting shrines.
Summarize this change management proposal, detailing the reasons for restructuring the customer support team, the timeline of changes, the training plan, and the metrics of success.
Summarize this textbook chapter on macroeconomics, explaining the definitions of GDP, inflation, unemployment, monetary policy, fiscal policy, and how they interact in a business cycle.
Summarize this product safety report for a smart home lock, outlining the vulnerability discovered (Bluetooth exploit), the firmware patch release, and user instructions for updating the device.
Summarize this strategic proposal for transitioning to a 3PL logistics provider, outlining cost savings, transit time reductions, inventory tracking changes, and risk factor mitigation.
Summarize this academic paper on the Lindy effect, explaining the mathematical foundations, historical examples, and how it applies to estimating the future lifespan of technologies and institutions.
Summarize this corporate travel policy, outlining eligible expenses, hotel booking guidelines, per diem allowances, and the expense reimbursement process.

Read the attached 50-page commercial Software Master Services Agreement (MSA). Provide a highly detailed, structured summary extracting all clauses relating to intellectual property ownership, source code escrow, liability limitations (including consequential and punitive damages caps), indemnification triggers for third-party patent infringements, data breach notification timelines, and governing law/arbitration provisions. Highlight any clauses that represent high business risk for a vendor company.

Summarize this comprehensive scientific literature review on CRISPR-Cas9 off-target mutations. Detail the biophysical mechanisms driving mismatch tolerance, the experimental methods used to detect off-target cuts (like GUIDE-seq and Dingo-seq), and the proposed engineering enhancements to the Cas9 protein (like high-fidelity variants) designed to minimize off-target cuts, explaining the trade-offs in editing efficiency.

Analyze and summarize this corporate annual report (SEC Form 10-K) for a multinational manufacturing conglomerate. Extract and synthesize the financial performance metrics (revenue, EBITDA, net debt to equity ratio), the primary risk factors mentioned (including supply chain vulnerabilities, foreign exchange exposures, and pending litigation), the segment-level operational performance, and the capital expenditure plans for the upcoming fiscal year, presenting the results in a tabular format.

Summarize this dense regulatory filing regarding banking capital requirements (Basel III framework). Explain the definitions and requirements for Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) capital, Capital Conservation Buffers, Countercyclical Buffers, Leverage Ratios, and Liquidity Coverage Ratios, detailing the transition timeline and the systemic risks these regulations aim to mitigate.

Summarize this complex medical case study of a patient presenting with overlapping symptoms of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and rheumatoid arthritis (rhupus syndrome). Detail the clinical history, laboratory findings (including ANA, anti-dsDNA, RF, and anti-CCP titers), radiological evidence of joint erosion, treatment protocol (including biologics and immunosuppressants), and the patient's longitudinal response, analyzing the diagnostic challenges.

Summarize this academic treatise on the development of contract law theory from common law foundations to modern uniform codes (UCC). Synthesize the arguments surrounding the doctrine of consideration, promissory estoppel, the parol evidence rule, and the standards for resolving contract ambiguity, comparing the classical formalist and realist legal perspectives.

Summarize this highly technical design specification for a decentralized database engine. Outline the consensus protocol (Raft), the memory storage layout (LSM-tree), the concurrency control mechanism (MVCC), and the network partition recovery strategy, explaining the trade-offs made between read latency, write amplification, and consistency.

Summarize this public policy environmental impact assessment report regarding a proposed deep-sea mining project. Outline the environmental baseline data, the projected impact on benthic ecosystems, the sediment plume modeling results, the mitigation strategies proposed by the mining company, and the criticisms raised by independent marine biologists.

Summarize this detailed audit of a cloud enterprise infrastructure's security posture. Synthesize the findings regarding IAM role permissions (least privilege violations), network perimeter controls (exposed ports), data encryption status (S3 buckets unencrypted), logging configurations, and specify prioritize remediation steps based on risk score.

Summarize this academic research paper on the macroeconomic effects of quantitative easing (QE) programs. Analyze the transmission channels discussed (portfolio balance, signaling, liquidity), the impact on bond yields and asset prices, the criticisms regarding income inequality, and the exit strategies (quantitative tightening).

Summarize this legal appellate court brief regarding a patent infringement case for a smartphone hardware component. Detail the technical claims, the arguments for and against claim construction, the evidence of prior art, the district court's ruling, and the basis for the appeal, analyzing the legal precedents cited.

Summarize this clinical protocol for a Phase III trial evaluating an oncology drug. Synthesize the patient inclusion/exclusion criteria, the randomized dosing schedules, the primary endpoints (overall survival, progression-free survival), the secondary safety endpoints, and the statistical power calculations, outlining the schedule of events.

Summarize this municipal government report on urban zoning reform. Outline the proposed changes to single-family zoning, the projected impact on housing density and affordability, the infrastructure capacity considerations (water, transit), and the public feedback themes from community hearings.

Summarize this academic article on the history of antitrust enforcement against tech monopolies. Synthesize the legal arguments in cases against IBM, Microsoft, and recent platforms, comparing the traditional consumer welfare standard with modern platform-dominance theories.

Summarize this detailed technical blueprint for establishing a security operations center (SOC). Synthesize the sections on tool ingestion (SIEM, EDR), incident triage workflows, team scheduling, metrics (MTTD, MTTR), and integration with executive crisis management protocols.

Summarize this environmental policy document regarding international carbon offset markets under Article 6 of the Paris Agreement. Detail the mechanisms for transferring mitigation outcomes, the rules to prevent double-counting, the additionality criteria, and the debates surrounding integrity.

Summarize this research paper on the physical and computing limitations of silicon scaling (ending of Moore's Law). Synthesize the physical barriers discussed (leakage currents, thermal dissipation), the architectural innovations (chiplets, 3D stacking), and the potential of alternative materials (carbon nanotubes).

Summarize this historical analysis of the fall of the Western Roman Empire. Synthesize the arguments regarding internal economic decay, military recruitment changes, pressure from external migrations, and administrative fragmentation, evaluating the weight assigned to each factor.

Summarize this technical specification for a high-frequency trading (HFT) hardware system. Outline the FPGA network interface card configurations, the direct memory access (DMA) protocols, the kernel bypass techniques, and the latency measurement methods (tick-to-trade).

Summarize this government policy report on national cybersecurity strategy. Synthesize the pillars of defending critical infrastructure, disrupting threat actors, shifting liability for insecure software, and investing in resilient technologies, explaining the legislative proposals.
